name: ProjectPort
body: A full-stack project onboarding and lifecycle automation platform for freelance developers and clients, reducing administrative overhead and streamlining communications.
highlights: Automated standard onboarding workflows with dynamic document signing.
Integrated real-time Slack notifications for client approval cycles.
Optimized MongoDB aggregations to load timeline tracking cards faster.

name: UiBrium
body: A lightweight, modern, and accessible React UI component library published on NPM, designed for building dark-themed tech product dashboards.
highlights: Designed semantic components with complete keyboard navigation support.
Bundled production packages using Rollup, reducing export footprint by 35%.
Optimized Tailwind classes to resolve configuration conflicts automatically.

name: Aryanony AI Bot
body: An intelligent custom bot built with Botpress and OpenAI APIs, handling complex workflow automation and answering customer FAQs with structured reasoning.
highlights: Wired OpenAI Assistants API threads with self-hosted n8n webhook nodes.
Configured automatic lead capturing, logging queries to Notion dashboards.
Structured fallback prompts to route complex cases directly to WhatsApp.
